evaluators.name: Beginner Mindfulness Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user filtered articles correctly for mindfulness basics and created a 5-article 'Week 1 Mindfulness' reading list with the 5 newest qualifying articles.

evaluators.name: Sleep Meditation Playlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered sleep meditations correctly and built an 'Evening Wind Down' playlist with the 3 shortest qualifying guided tracks rated at least 4.5.

evaluators.name: Full Moon Ritual Guides Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched correctly for full moon ritual guides and created a 'Moon Rituals' collection with the 3 most recent qualifying guides.

evaluators.name: Stress Quiz and Journal Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user completed the 10-question stress quiz with a Low score (0) and created a linked journal entry whose title includes today’s date and whose body mentions the stress level.

evaluators.name: Breathwork for Anxiety Event Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user filtered events correctly and registered 'Test User' for the earliest qualifying evening Breathwork for Anxiety workshop within the 30-day window.

evaluators.name: Morning Self-Compassion Affirmation Set Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered affirmations by the Self-Compassion tag and created a 'Morning Self-Compassion' set with the 5 newest qualifying affirmations scheduled daily at 7:00 AM.

evaluators.name: 3-Day Digital Detox Challenge Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered challenges correctly and enrolled in the easy 3-day digital detox challenge starting on the upcoming Monday.

evaluators.name: Beginner Evening Yoga Selection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered beginner evening practices correctly, compared the first two top-rated results, and added the higher-rated one to Today’s Practice for today.
